days.title: Arrival in Paro
days.desc: Fly into Paro over the Himalayas, meet your guide, and visit Rinpung Dzong and the National Museum before checking into your hotel.

days.title: Hike to Tiger's Nest Monastery
days.desc: A 4-5 hour round-trip hike to Taktsang Palphug, Bhutan's most iconic monastery, clinging to a cliff 900m above the valley.

days.title: Kyichu Lhakhang & Departure
days.desc: Visit one of Bhutan's oldest temples before your transfer to Paro International Airport for your onward flight.

days.title: Arrival in Paro
days.desc: Fly into Paro over the Himalayas, meet your guide, and visit Rinpung Dzong and the National Museum before checking into your hotel.

days.title: Hike to Tiger's Nest Monastery
days.desc: A 4-5 hour round-trip hike to Taktsang Palphug, Bhutan's most iconic monastery, clinging to a cliff 900m above the valley.

days.title: Drive to Thimphu
days.desc: Visit the Buddha Dordenma statue, Tashichho Dzong, and the weekend market, then explore the capital's handicraft shops.

days.title: Dochula Pass & Punakha
days.desc: Cross Dochula Pass (108 chortens, Himalayan views) en route to Punakha Dzong and the longest suspension bridge in Bhutan.

days.title: Departure
days.desc: Transfer back to Paro International Airport for your onward flight.

days.title: Arrival in Paro
days.desc: Fly into Paro, meet your guide, and visit Rinpung Dzong before checking into your hotel.

days.title: Drive to Thimphu
days.desc: Buddha Dordenma statue, Tashichho Dzong, and the National Memorial Chorten in Bhutan's capital.

days.title: Thimphu to Punakha via Dochula Pass
days.desc: Stop at the 108-chorten pass before descending to Punakha Dzong and its riverside suspension bridge.

days.title: Punakha to Haa Valley via Chele La Pass
days.desc: Cross Chele La, one of Bhutan's highest motorable passes, into the quiet, rarely visited Haa Valley.

days.title: Haa Valley Homestay
days.desc: A full day in Haa — a local farmhouse homestay, village walk, and a traditional archery demonstration.

days.title: Return to Paro & Departure
days.desc: Drive back over Chele La to Paro for your transfer to the airport.

days.title: Arrival in Paro
days.desc: Scenic Himalayan flight into Paro, welcome by your guide, and an easy afternoon visiting Kyichu Lhakhang temple.

days.title: Tiger's Nest Monastery
days.desc: Full-day hike to Taktsang Monastery with a rest stop at the halfway cafeteria overlooking the cliff.

days.title: Thimphu City Tour
days.desc: Buddha Dordenma, Tashichho Dzong, the National Memorial Chorten, and the takin (national animal) preserve.

days.title: Thimphu to Punakha via Dochula Pass
days.desc: Stop at the 108-chorten pass before descending to Punakha Dzong and its riverside setting.

days.title: Punakha to Phobjikha Valley
days.desc: Drive over Lawala Pass into the glacial Phobjikha Valley, home to the rare black-necked crane.

days.title: Phobjikha to Bumthang
days.desc: Continue east to Bumthang, Bhutan's spiritual heartland, visiting Jambay Lhakhang along the way.

days.title: Bumthang Temple Circuit
days.desc: Explore Kurjey Lhakhang, Tamshing Monastery, and a local farmhouse for lunch and butter tea.

days.title: Fly out from Bumthang or Paro
days.desc: Departure transfer to the airport, ending your circuit of central and western Bhutan.

days.title: Arrival in Paro
days.desc: Fly into Paro, meet your guide, and visit Rinpung Dzong before checking into your hotel.

days.title: Hike to Tiger's Nest Monastery
days.desc: A 4-5 hour round-trip hike to Taktsang Palphug, Bhutan's most iconic monastery.

days.title: Thimphu City Tour
days.desc: Day trip to the capital — weekend market, Tashichho Dzong, and a traditional hot stone bath in the evening.

days.title: Departure
days.desc: Return to Paro and transfer to the airport for your onward flight.

days.title: Arrival & Trek Briefing in Paro
days.desc: Gear check, permit processing, and an early night before the trek begins.

days.title: Paro to Jele Dzong
days.desc: Start the trek climbing through forest to Jele Dzong at 3,400m, your first camp with views back over Paro valley.

days.title: Jele Dzong to Jangchulakha
days.desc: A ridge walk through rhododendron forest with views of Mt. Jomolhari on clear days.

days.title: Jangchulakha to Jimilangtsho Lake
days.desc: Trek past yak herder camps to camp beside Jimilangtsho, one of the trek's scenic alpine lakes.

days.title: Jimilangtsho to Simkotra Lake
days.desc: A shorter, higher-altitude day camping beside Simkotra Lake at around 4,100m.

days.title: Simkotra to Phajoding to Thimphu
days.desc: Descend past Phajoding Monastery into Thimphu, trading the tent for a hotel bed.

days.title: Departure
days.desc: Morning at leisure in Thimphu before your transfer to Paro International Airport.

days.title: Arrival & Trek Briefing in Paro
days.desc: Permit processing, gear check, and final preparations before heading into the mountains.

days.title: Drukgyel Dzong to Sharna Zampa
days.desc: Drive to the trailhead at Drukgyel Dzong and trek alongside the Pa Chhu river to your first camp.

days.title: Sharna to Thangthangka
days.desc: A steady climb through pine and fir forest into the shadow of Mt. Jomolhari.

days.title: Thangthangka to Jangothang
days.desc: Trek to Jangothang, the Jomolhari base camp, with the peak dominating the skyline ahead.

days.title: Acclimatization Day at Jangothang
days.desc: A rest day with an optional side hike toward Tshophu Lakes for closer mountain views.

days.title: Jangothang to Lingshi
days.desc: Cross Nyile La pass (4,890m) and descend into the remote village of Lingshi.

days.title: Lingshi to Shodu
days.desc: Trek through Lingshi's dzong and down the Thimphu Chhu valley toward Shodu.

days.title: Shodu to Barshong & Drive to Thimphu
days.desc: Final trekking day out to the roadhead, followed by a drive into Thimphu for a well-earned hotel bed.

days.title: Departure
days.desc: Morning at leisure before your transfer to Paro International Airport.

days.title: Arrival in Paro
days.desc: Fly into Paro, meet your guide, and visit Rinpung Dzong before your onward drive.

days.title: Paro to Thimphu Trail Section
days.desc: Walk a restored section of the historic pilgrim trail linking Paro and the capital.

days.title: Thimphu City Tour
days.desc: Buddha Dordenma, Tashichho Dzong, and the National Memorial Chorten.

days.title: Dochula Pass Trail Section
days.desc: Trek a section of the trail near Dochula Pass, past its 108 memorial chortens.

days.title: Punakha Valley Trail
days.desc: Walk trail sections through the Punakha valley, visiting Punakha Dzong along the way.

days.title: Punakha to Trongsa
days.desc: Drive and trek toward Trongsa, home to the largest dzong in Bhutan.

days.title: Trongsa Dzong & Village Homestay
days.desc: Explore Trongsa Dzong before an overnight homestay in a remote village along the trail.

days.title: Trongsa to Bumthang Trail Section
days.desc: Continue east on foot toward Bumthang, Bhutan's spiritual heartland.

days.title: Bumthang Temple Circuit
days.desc: Kurjey Lhakhang, Tamshing Monastery, and a farewell farmhouse meal.

days.title: Departure
days.desc: Fly out from Bumthang or transfer back to Paro for your onward flight.

days.title: Arrival in Paro
days.desc: Fly into Paro, meet your guide, and settle in ahead of the festival.

days.title: Paro Tshechu Festival
days.desc: A full day at the festival grounds watching masked Cham dances performed by monks and laymen in elaborate costume.

days.title: Hike to Tiger's Nest Monastery
days.desc: A 4-5 hour round-trip hike to Taktsang Palphug, clinging to a cliff above the Paro valley.

days.title: Drive to Thimphu
days.desc: Buddha Dordenma statue, Tashichho Dzong, and the capital's weekend market.

days.title: Dochula Pass & Punakha Dzong
days.desc: Cross the 108-chorten pass to Punakha Dzong and its riverside suspension bridge.

days.title: Return to Paro & Departure
days.desc: Transfer back to Paro International Airport for your onward flight.

days.title: Arrival & Golden Hour at Rinpung Dzong
days.desc: Settle in, then head to Rinpung Dzong for evening light over the Paro valley.

days.title: Sunrise Shoot at the Tiger's Nest Viewpoint
days.desc: An early start to catch first light on Taktsang Monastery before the trail crowds arrive.

days.title: Drive to Thimphu, Sunset at Buddha Dordenma
days.desc: Travel to the capital and end the day shooting the giant Buddha statue as it lights up at dusk.

days.title: Thimphu Portraits & Weekend Market
days.desc: Portrait sessions with local artisans and candid shots at Thimphu's lively weekend market.

days.title: Dochula Pass at Sunrise
days.desc: Catch the 108 chortens against a clear Himalayan sunrise before continuing to Punakha.

days.title: Punakha Dzong Golden Hour
days.desc: Shoot Punakha Dzong and its suspension bridge in the warm evening light.

days.title: Free Morning & Village Walk
days.desc: A relaxed morning to review and edit your shots, followed by an afternoon walk through a nearby farming village.

days.title: Departure
days.desc: Transfer back to Paro International Airport for your onward flight.
